visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicant going for study purpose need to apply for the given category.

## Visa Fees
Visa fee will be Rs.11740 (EUR 123). No visa fee waiver for this category of travel except for holders of diplomatic and service passports.
Please note:
- There is a service charge of INR 1920/- For Biometrics (D visa Application).

## Documents Required
For documents, Please refer the Hungary Embassy website.
Click here for Seasonal Employment checklist.

Travel Medical Insurance
Each applicant (including children) must have a travel medical insurance. The list of Schengen approved Travel medical insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Photo requirements for visa applications
- 1 photo must be:
- no more than six months old
- in colour
- sized as for passports (35-40 mm wide)
- sharp, clear and of good quality
- full-face (showing the entire head and the top of the shoulders)
- White Background photo is required
- without a head-dress, except for religious reasons
- taken directly from the front
Glasses are permitted, provided that that the eyes remain clearly visible and there is no reflection in the lenses.
Head-dress is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not cast any shadow over the face.
The photograph for visas must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photos.
Examples of acceptable photos:

[hun > ind > en > Table:Seasonal Employment > Photo Specifications 1]
Examples of non-acceptable photos

[hun > ind > en > Table:Seasonal Employment > Photo Specifications 2]

## Application Form
The application shall be submitted with the form “Application for Residence Permit” and one of the following Appendixes completed and printed. (Residence permit for the purpose of employment or for the purpose of family reunification, EU Blue Card, Residence permit for the purpose of research, for seasonal working, and for the purpose of intra-corporate transfer.)
Forms optimised for Microsoft Word to be completed electronically:
- Application for Residence Permit (https://www.oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX) AND Appendix for Residence Permit for Employment (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Foglalkoztat%C3%A1si%20c%C3%A9l/9.6._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Employment.docx) Or for Family Reunification (http://bmbah.hu/images/Formanyomtatvany_OIF_angol/csaladegyesito/2_Family_reunification_APNDX_2.docx) Or for EU Blue Card (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/EU%20K%C3%A9k%20K%C3%A1rtya/9.9._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_EU_Blue_Card.pdf) Or for Purpose of Research (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Kutat%C3%B3/9.11._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Research_or_long-term_mobility_of_researchers.docx) and Long-term Mobility of Researchers (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Kutat%C3%B3/9.11._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Research_or_long-term_mobility_of_researchers.docx) or Seasonal Working (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Szezon%C3%A1lis%20munkav%C3%A1llal%C3%A1s/9.4._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Seasonal_employment.docx) or for Purpose of Intra-corporate Transfer (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/V%C3%A1llalaton%20bel%C3%BCli%20%C3%A1thelyez%C3%A9s/9.10._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Intra-corporate_transfer_and_long-term_intra-corporate_mobility.docx)

visa_types.name: Business trip
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased,please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/hun/travel-insurance)
- Two recent passport size photographs in colour with white background (3.5cm by 4.5cm).
- Employment certificate duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the business entity (*).
- Letter of invitation from the Hungarian business partner duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the business entity (*).
- Providing evidence of the actual business relations in Hungary by a letter of reference from the Hungarian/ Indian Company
- Prearranged accommodation. Reservation of accommodation is accepted provided that you paid a deposit or have to pay a cancellation fee. Please note that proof of prearranged accommodation has to be presented even if it is arranged or covered by the Hungarian business partner.
- Salary slip of the last three months from the employer duly stamped and signed by an authorized person (*).
- Income tax return acknowledgment for the last two assessment years.
- Bank account statement of the applicant for the last three month duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the bank (*).
- Certificate of registration in the case of the self-employed duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Visa application can be submitted at Hungarian Visa Application Centers by third persons presenting authorization duly signed by the applicant and certified by public notary.
- Require front and back side photocopy of the current passport.
- Airplane ticket booking.
- Travel medical insurance
Please make note that all documents marked with (*) have to be enclosed in original.

Photo requirements for visa applications

- sized as for passports (35-40 mm wide)
- sharp, clear and of good quality
- full-face (showing the entire head and the top of the shoulders)

- taken directly from the front

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Nationals of Bangladesh and Sri Lanka need airport transit visa for transiting between terminals at Budapest Liszt Ferenc International Airport in Hungary. (http://www.bud.hu/english)
Please note that nationals of Sri Lanka must lodge their visa and airport transit visa application with the German Embassy Colombo which issue visa on Hungary`s behalf. The airport transit visa application procedure and conditions for issuing such visas are the same as if you wish to visit Germany. Therefore, you are advised to refer to the German Embassy in Colombo (http://www.colombo.diplo.de/Vertretung/colombo/en/04/Anschrift_20VFS__Seite.html) websites respectively for further enquiries.
If you transit through several airports in Schengen States, you need to turn to that Schengen State on which territory the first transit airport is situated.
- You do not need airport transit visa if you
- Hold a valid residence permit issued by a European Union Member State, or Andorra, Canada, Japan, San Marino or the United States of America guaranteeing the holder’s unconditional readmission;
- hold a valid visa issued by a European Union Member State, or for Canada, Japan or the United States of America guaranteeing the holder’s unconditional readmission when travelling to the issuing country or to any other third country, or when, having used the visa, returning from the issuing country;
Canada, Japan or the U.S.;
- when you return from any of the countries listed in point (3) after having used the visa;
- are family member of citizens of the European Union;
- are holder of diplomatic passport.
- are flight crew member who are national of a contracting Party to the Chicago Convention on International Civil Aviation.
Application procedure for airport transit visa is the same as the one for short stay visa. Supporting documents may however be different

## Overview
Applicant going for Visiting friend or family purpose need to apply for the given category.

## Visa Fees
Visa fee will be Rs.11740 (EUR 123). No visa fee waiver for this category of travel except for holders of diplomatic and service passports.
Please note:
- There is a service charge of INR 1920/- For Biometrics (D visa Application).

## Documents Required
For documents, Please refer the Hungary Embassy website.
Click here for Visiting Friend Or Family checklist.
Travel Medical Insurance
Each applicant (including children) must have a travel medical insurance. The list of Schengen approved Travel medical insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Photo requirements for visa applications
- 1 photo must be:
- no more than six months old
- in colour
- sized as for passports (35-40 mm wide)
- sharp, clear and of good quality
- full-face (showing the entire head and the top of the shoulders)
- White Background photo is required
- without a head-dress, except for religious reasons
- taken directly from the front
Glasses are permitted, provided that that the eyes remain clearly visible and there is no reflection in the lenses.
Head-dress is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not cast any shadow over the face.
The photograph for visas must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photos.
Examples of acceptable photos:

[hun > ind > en > Table:Visiting friend or family > Photo Specifications 1]
Examples of non-acceptable photos

[hun > ind > en > Table:Visiting friend or family > Photo Specifications 2]

visa_types.name: Conference
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased,please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/hun/travel-insurance)
- Two recent passport size photographs in colour with white background (3.5cm by 4.5cm).
- Letter of invitation or confirmation of registration including reference to the receipt of registration fee issued by the host organization duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Prearranged accommodation. Reservation of accommodation is accepted provided that you paid a deposit or have to pay a cancellation fee. Please note that proof of prearranged accommodation has to be presented even if it is arranged or provided by the Hungarian organizer.
- Employment certificate duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the business entity (*).
- Educational institution enrollment certificate referring to the permission granted for leave duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the institution if the travel is taking place during the academic year (*).
- Salary slip of the last three months from the employer or in case of student his/her sponsor’s duly stamped and signed by an authorized person (*).
- Income tax return acknowledgment for the last two assessment years.
- Pension slip of the last three months duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Certificate of registration in the case of the self-employed duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Bank account statement of the applicant or in case of student his/her sponsor’s for the last three month duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the bank (*).
- Visa application can be submitted at Hungarian Visa Application Centers by third persons presenting authorization duly signed by the applicant and certified by public notary.
- Require front and back side photocopy of the current passport.
- Airplane ticket booking.
- Travel medical insurance.
Please make note that all documents marked with (*) have to be enclosed in original.
Click Here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/hungary/India/english/pdf/conference-visa-document.pdf) for Conference Checklist

visa_types.overview:
Overview
In order for you to be eligible to a more favorable visa procedure as a family member of a national of a European Union Member State, Iceland, Lichtenstein, Norway or Switzerland (hereafter:
                                                                        EEA citizens) you are requested to provide evidence that: 
- Your close family member who is EEA citizen (including Hungarian nationals) is visiting or returning to Hungary.
Close family members are
- the spouse;
- the partner with whom the EEA citizen has contracted a registered partnership, on the basis of the legislation of any EEA country, if the legislation of the host Member State
                                                                                    treats registered partnership as equivalent to marriage;
- the direct descendants who are under the age of 21 or are dependent as well as those of the spouse or partner as defined above; or
- the dependent direct relatives in the ascending line and those of the spouse or partner as defined above.
- You are actually traveling or joining with your close family member to his/her trip to Hungary.
“From the 1st of January 2019. third-country national family members of Hungarian citizens have been excluded from the Act on the Admission and Residence of Persons with the Right of
                                                                        Free Movement and Residence, Act I. of 2007. (Szmtv) and its implementing regulation (Szmvhr) and are subjects to the Act on the Admission and Right of Residence of Third-Country
                                                                        Nationals, Act II. of 2007. (Harmtv.) and its implementing regulation (Harmvhr).
Thus, for third-country national family members of Hungarian citizens, the possibility to apply for a so-called C-EEA/visitor visa is no longer available.
From now on, third-country national family members of Hungarian citizens face two options in visa procedures.
If the family member of a Hungarian citizen plans only a short-term stay, the applicant needs to apply for a C (visit type) visa, to which the general rules apply.
If the family member of a Hungarian citizen plans a stay for a period longer than 90 days, the applicant, on grounds of family reunification, may submit an application for a „D” type
                                                                        visa, which, at the same time, entitles the applicant to obtain a residence permit. (in case of accompanying or joining his/her Hungarian family member)
Please note, that by submitting a visa application, the applicable visa fee must be paid immediately.
It is important to highlight that this regulation doesn’t apply for third-country family members of EEA nationals (non-Hungarian EEA national). They are still entitled to apply for C-EEA/visitor
                                                                        visa.”

                                                                        Free Movement and Residence, Act I. of 2007. (Szmtv) and its implementing regulation (Szmvhr) and are subjects to the Act on the Admission and Right of Residence of Third-Country
                                                                        Nationals, Act II. of 2007. (Harmtv.) and its implementing regulation (Harmvhr).
Thus, for third-country national family members of Hungarian citizens, the possibility to apply for a so-called C-EEA/visitor visa is no longer available.
From now on, third-country national family members of Hungarian citizens face two options in visa procedures.
If the family member of a Hungarian citizen plans only a short-term stay, the applicant needs to apply for a C (visit type) visa, to which the general rules apply.
If the family member of a Hungarian citizen plans a stay for a period longer than 90 days, the applicant, on grounds of family reunification, may submit an application for a „D” type
                                                                        visa, which, at the same time, entitles the applicant to obtain a residence permit. (in case of accompanying or joining his/her Hungarian family member)
Please note, that by submitting a visa application, the applicable visa fee must be paid immediately.
It is important to highlight that this regulation doesn’t apply for third-country family members of EEA nationals (non-Hungarian EEA national). They are still entitled to apply for C-EEA/visitor
                                                                        visa.”

## Visa Fees
Visa fee is not applicable for the family members of EU/EEA citizens.
Please note:
- There is a service charge of INR 2133/- For Biometrics and 1600/- for without Biometrics (Inclusive of CGST9% AND SGST9% levied per application over and above the visa fees)

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased,please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/hun/travel-insurance)
When you apply for a short stay visa as a family member of an EEA citizen you are expected to present the following documents. Kindly make note that if any of the following documents are not presented when lodging application you will not be able to claim your EEA family member status. For that reason, Hungarian Visa Application Centre will request you to present other supporting documents when lodging application enlisted as requisite documents for visiting family members.
- Two recent passport size photographs in colour with white background (3.5cm by 4.5cm).
- Copy of the passport or ID card of the EEA citizen who is your close family member.
- Require front and back side photocopy of the current passport.
- Certificate of marriage registered in a European Union Member State, Iceland, Lichtenstein Norway or Switzerland (*).
- Certificate of registration of partnership in a European Union Member State, Iceland, Lichtenstein Norway or Switzerland (*) or
- Birth certificate registered in a European Union Member State, Iceland, Lichtenstein Norway or Switzerland (*);
- Your airplane ticket booking as well as that of the EEA citizen who is your close family member if you are traveling together to Hungary;
- Invitation letter for visiting Hungarian/EU/EEA national family member in Hungary has to be endorsed by Hungarian public notary, consular officer or by two Hungarian/EU/EEA national witnesses (*).
- Please be advised that the invitation letter must be issued in Hungarian language if your host is Hungarian national.
- Visa application can be submitted at Hungarian Visa Application Centers by third persons presenting authorization duly signed by the applicant and certified by public notary.
Please make note that all documents marked with (*) have to be enclosed in original.
Click Here for Family Member of EU National Checklist
Click Here for Family Member of EU National checklist for south & west (Mumbai, Chennai, Bengaluru, Cochin, Pune, Goa, Puducherry, Hyderabad, Ahmedabad)
Travel Medical Insurance
Each applicant (including children) must have a travel medical insurance. The list of Schengen approved Travel medical insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Photo requirements for visa applications
- 1 photo must be:
- no more than six months old
- in colour
- sized as for passports (35-40 mm wide)
- sharp, clear and of good quality
- full-face (showing the entire head and the top of the shoulders)
- White Background photo is required
- without a head-dress, except for religious reasons
- taken directly from the front
Glasses are permitted, provided that that the eyes remain clearly visible and there is no reflection in the lenses.
Head-dress is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not cast any shadow over the face.
The photograph for visas must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photos.

When you're ready to apply, click here to access the visa application form. Fill it out online, then download and print it to bring to the Visa Application Centre.
For MUMBAI & West zone - click here to access the visa application form. Fill it out online, then download and print it to bring to the Visa Application Centre

Please write your e-mail ID in column 17 of your visa application Form. The Embassy / Consulate of Hungary will write the e-mail for the communication, if required.
Those who don’t have e-mail address please provide the ID of the travel agents or close relative. Failing to do so will result in the refusal of the visa application.

- Two recent passport size photographs in colour with white background (3.5cm by 4.5cm).

- Employment certificate referring to the permission granted for leave duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the business entity (*).
- Educational institution enrollment certificate referring to the permission granted for leave duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the institution if the travel is taking place during the academic year (*).
- Salary slip of the last three months from the employer or in case of student his/her sponsor’s duly stamped and signed by an authorized person (*).

- Pension slip of the last three months duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Bank account statement of the applicant or in case of student his/her sponsor’s for the last three month duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the bank (*).
- Certificate of registration in the case of the self-employed or in case of student his/her sponsor’s duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Require front and back side photocopy of the passport.
- Airplane ticket booking.
- Travel medical insurance.
Please make note that all documents marked with (*) have to be enclosed in original.

## Photo Specifications
Photo requirements for visa applications
- 1 photo must be:
- no more than six months old
- in colour
- sized as for passports (35-40 mm wide)
- sharp, clear and of good quality
- full-face (showing the entire head and the top of the shoulders)
- White Background photo is required
- without a head-dress, except for religious reasons
- taken directly from the front
Glasses are permitted, provided that that the eyes remain clearly visible and there is no reflection in the lenses.
Head-dress is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not cast any shadow over the face.
The photograph for visas must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photos.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased,please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/hun/travel-insurance)
- Two recent passport size photographs in colour with white background (3.5cm by 4.5cm).
- Certificate of the receiving health institution including reference to the fact that the expected coverage of the medical treatment is available and accommodation is provided by the health institution (*). Please be advised that coverage of the medical treatment has to be proved beyond doubt if the latter certificate does not include reference to availability of the coverage or refers to the applicants own private or other sources.
- Reservation of accommodation outside the health institution can be accepted provided that you paid a deposit or have to pay a cancellation fee.
- Salary slip of the last three months from the employer or in case of student his/her sponsor’s duly stamped and signed by an authorized person (*).
- Income tax return acknowledgment or in case of student his/her sponsor’s for the last two assessment years.
- Pension slip of the last three months duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Bank account statement of the applicant or in case of student his/her sponsor’s for the last three month duly signed and stamped by an authorized person of the bank (*).
- Certificate of registration in the case of the self-employed or in case of student his/her sponsor’s duly signed and stamped by an authorized person (*).
- Visa application can be submitted at Hungarian Visa Application Centers by third persons presenting authorization duly signed by the applicant and certified by public notary.
- Require front and back side photocopy of the current passport.
- Airplane ticket booking.
- Travel medical insurance.
Please make note that all documents marked with (*) have to be enclosed in original.
Click Here for Medical treatment Checklist
Travel Medical Insurance
Each applicant (including children) must have a travel medical insurance. The list of Schengen approved Travel medical insurance companies

## Photo Specifications
Photo requirements for visa applications
- 1 photo must be:
- no more than six months old
- in colour
- sized as for passports (35-40 mm wide)
- sharp, clear and of good quality
- full-face (showing the entire head and the top of the shoulders)
- White Background photo is required
- without a head-dress, except for religious reasons
- taken directly from the front
Glasses are permitted, provided that that the eyes remain clearly visible and there is no reflection in the lenses.
Head-dress is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not cast any shadow over the face.
The photograph for visas must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photos.

- Save the form on your computer.

The application shall be submitted with the form “Application for Residence Permit” and one of the following Appendixes completed and printed. (Residence permit for the purpose of employment or for the purpose of family reunification, EU Blue Card, Residence permit for the purpose of research, for seasonal working, and for the purpose of intra-corporate transfer.)
Forms optimised for Microsoft Word to be completed electronically:
- Application for Residence Permit (https://www.oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX) AND Appendix for Residence Permit for Employment (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Foglalkoztat%C3%A1si%20c%C3%A9l/9.6._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Employment.docx) Or for Family Reunification (http://bmbah.hu/images/Formanyomtatvany_OIF_angol/csaladegyesito/2_Family_reunification_APNDX_2.docx) Or for EU Blue Card (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/EU%20K%C3%A9k%20K%C3%A1rtya/9.9._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_EU_Blue_Card.pdf) Or for Purpose of Research (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Kutat%C3%B3/9.11._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Research_or_long-term_mobility_of_researchers.docx) and Long-term Mobility of Researchers (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Kutat%C3%B3/9.11._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Research_or_long-term_mobility_of_researchers.docx) or Seasonal Working (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/Szezon%C3%A1lis%20munkav%C3%A1llal%C3%A1s/9.4._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Seasonal_employment.docx) or for Purpose of Intra-corporate Transfer (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/V%C3%A1llalaton%20bel%C3%BCli%20%C3%A1thelyez%C3%A9s/9.10._Appendix_to_an_application_for_a_residence_permit_-_Intra-corporate_transfer_and_long-term_intra-corporate_mobility.docx)
